itemEditor.stepMaterialsHint: Edit the materials consumed and the outputs produced by this flow step.
itemEditor.stepEquipmentHint: Edit the equipment requirements attached to this flow step.
itemEditor.stepParametersHint: Edit the parameter targets attached to this flow step.
itemEditor.stepQualityHint: Edit the quality checks attached to this flow step.
itemEditor.equipmentQuantityPositive: Equipment quantity must be 1 or greater.
itemEditor.durationNonNegative: Duration must be zero or greater.
itemEditor.targetNotFound: The requested recipe item was not found.
itemEditor.loadFailed: Failed to load the recipe item editor.
itemEditor.saveFailed: Failed to save the recipe item.
itemEditor.saveFailedWithMessage: Failed to save the recipe item. {message}
